title: verbascum × kerneri
intro: Verbascum × kerneri, also known as Kern's mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its tall stature and showy white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Verbascum × kerneri include its potential to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, with its leaves and flowers being harvested for their medicinal properties.
